families.currentNote: Patient, identifier, coverage, and VSD snapshot workflows are covered by unit-style integration tests.

Diagnosis lifecycle and persisted coding evaluations exist, and fixture-backed SDICD/SDKH/SDKRW coverage now checks both rule outcomes and package-integrity metadata through a shared local oracle. No executable package oracle exists yet.
Official .con fixtures from the XPM package are covered in automated cold-start and warm-cache tests, including positive and negative validator cases.
The full official Q3_2026 ERP XML archive runs through the real validator and now completes without error findings in the automated suite.
Official eAU examples validate via the executable FHIR path from an empty cache.
Official BMP example XMLs are covered through the downloaded KBV XSD package and example archive.
Local oracle checks now run official KBV Heilmittel Pruefpaket-derived fixtures for blanko handling, approvals, and quantity limits.
Local BFB oracle coverage now validates template declaration, positioned fields, and barcode payload metadata from deterministic render-context fixtures. No full certified PDF renderer exists yet.
Immutability and issuance flows are tested through medication, eAU, and Heilmittel workflows.
Schema is present; production workflows are largely unimplemented.
Schema is present; emitter and oracle work are not implemented.
Schema is present; transport and runtime behavior are not implemented.
Public appointments/referrals workflows now support TSS-style listing, filtering, vermittlungscode lookup, and booking semantics, with local fixture-backed oracle coverage for selection behavior.
Historical import and export architecture is modeled, but no validator or import implementation exists.
